userStories.title: Add login form
acceptanceCriteria: Boundary value testing (empty input,超长输入)
userStories.testStrategy: Deep branch coverage + Boundary value analysis

forbiddenPatterns: Tests that only verify method existence (e.g., assert(typeof fn === 'function'))
Tests that assert input equals itself (e.g., assert.strictEqual(input.code, ''))
Tests without concrete assertions on actual return values
Tests that only create objects without calling functions
Redundant tests that cover the same branch
requiredPatterns: Each test MUST call the actual function being tested
Each test MUST verify actual behavior (return values, side effects, exceptions)
At least one test for each if/else branch
At least one test for each exception throw point
Boundary values (0, 1, null, undefined, empty string) must be tested
Test descriptions MUST reference line numbers from coverage report
autoRejectIf: Coverage does not improve after adding tests

sandboxModeConfig.description: Sandbox mode is enabled via IN_WEAVEFOX_SANDBOX environment variable. When enabled, tests will not be executed - static code analysis is used instead to ESTIMATE coverage.

howCoverageIsCalculated.method: Static code analysis - no test execution
steps: 1. Parse source files to identify all branches (if/else/switch/catch/ternary/throw)
2. Parse test files to extract test descriptions and function calls
3. Match test descriptions to source branches using:
4. Calculate branch coverage = (matched branches / total branches) * 100%
howCoverageIsCalculated.accuracy: Estimated values may differ from actual coverage by 5-15%
improveAccuracy: Include line numbers in test descriptions: it('line 45-47: should handle empty input', ...)
Use descriptive keywords: it('should throw error when invalid', ...)
Add coverage comments: // Covers: line 45-47 (empty validation)

verificationSteps: Review uncovered branches and add corresponding tests
Update uncoveredLines based on analysis output
Update currentCoverage with estimated percentage (mark as estimated)
sandboxModeConfig.notes: Sandbox mode provides ESTIMATED coverage when test execution is not possible. Controlled by IN_WEAVEFOX_SANDBOX environment variable. Always verify with real tests when environment allows.
